deadlines.label: Question submission deadline
deadlines.notes: Originally due Feb 11, corrected to Feb 10 at noon EST by Amendment 00001, then extended to Feb 13 at 9:00 AM EST by Amendment 00002 due to SAM.gov attachment issue. No additional questions accepted after this deadline.
deadlines.rawText: This Amendment extends the question submission deadline to 9:00 AM EST on February 13, 2026

deadlines.label: Demonstration scheduling deadline
deadlines.notes: Offerors must email available times for an online demo (MS Teams or Zoom) between 10am-2:30pm EST M-F. The demo is a decisional criterion for award selection. Q&A confirmed DOT will not extend this deadline. Demos are 30-60 minutes.
deadlines.rawText: Offerors must schedule a demonstration by 12pm EST on or before March 2, 2026

deadlines.label: Proposal submission deadline
deadlines.notes: Originally stated as Thursday March 27 at 10AM EST; Amendment 00003 corrected the day to Friday March 27; Amendment 00007 extended the deadline to Monday March 30, 2026 at 10AM EST. Submit via email to Melinda.Riddick@dot.gov with cc to Robin.Golden@dot.gov. Only 3 business days extension from original date — tight turnaround after demos.
deadlines.rawText: the proposal due date is hereby changed from March 27, 2026, to Monday, March 30, 2026, at 10am EST

deadlines.label: Anticipated award decision date
deadlines.notes: Per Q&A in Amendment 00006, DOT anticipates award by April 1, 2026. Separately, DOT also stated they anticipate award by May 1, 2026 (base period start). Extremely tight — only 2 days after proposal due date of March 30, suggesting evaluation may be largely pre-determined or very rapid. Base period starts May 1, 2026.
deadlines.rawText: What is the anticipated award decision date following proposal submission? Answer: April 1, 2026
